description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, metallic pole with a smooth, cylindrical profile and a dark lower section. At the top, the pole splits symmetrically into two gently curved arms, each supporting a streamlined, modern lamp head. The lamp heads are elongated and flat, with a minimalist design and no visible decorative elements, suggesting a focus on functionality and contemporary aesthetics. The arms extend outward in a Y-shape, providing wide coverage for illuminating large areas such as roadways or intersections. The overall construction appears robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where durability and effective lighting are priorities. The surface finish is consistent and unadorned, emphasizing practicality over ornamentation.
description: A tall, Y-shaped street light with two modern, streamlined lamp heads on curved arms and a plain, metallic pole. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban roadways.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the symmetrical Y-shaped split and both lamp heads extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pole and the lamp heads, with both arms aligned and minimal visible width.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the Y-shaped arms and both lamp heads from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and alignment of the arms and lamp heads.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, elongated lamp heads with a flat, minimalist profile and no decorative elements or visible diffusers.
